title: rubus pseudorivularis
intro: Rubus pseudorivularis, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus pseudorivularis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, powder, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, skin conditions, and respiratory issues.
